name: CLOCKIN
title: Skill Catalog
description: Public skill listings for bindable AI workflows.

skills.name: Opportunity Scan
skills.output: buyer pain, offer angle, and next action
skills.safety: Public pages only. No logins, private dashboards, personal data, or account-specific scraping.

skills.name: Offer Builder
skills.safety: No guaranteed revenue claims, pressure tactics, fake proof, or misleading scarcity.

skills.name: Distribution Pack
skills.output: X post, README block, landing copy
skills.safety: No fake engagement, no guaranteed demand, no impersonation, and no spam automation.

skills.name: Skill Listing Builder
skills.output: SKILL.md listing, schema, and safety notes
skills.safety: No secrets, no private repos unless the user explicitly provides access, and no credential handling.

skills.name: Creator Pass Preview
skills.input: public Solana address, creator name, and skill idea
skills.output: readiness card, listing draft, and next AI prompt
skills.safety: Format check only. No wallet connection, no ownership verification, no balance check, no transfer, and no private wallet data.
